summary: Iteration 86 - Frontend-only testing for Purchase Order module fix and validation completed. All 5 test scenarios PASSED. Search in Daftar PO, Form Buat PO header fields, item picker, item grid columns, and save PO functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PurchaseOrders.jsx - Search functionality filters PO by number, supplier name, and notes using backend search parameter
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Form header contains only required fields: No PO, Tanggal, Supplier, Gudang Tujuan, PIC, Akun Pembayaran, Catatan
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Unwanted fields (Cabang, Jam, Dept, Referensi PO, Jenis Transaksi) are NOT present
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Item grid shows simplified columns: No, Kode, Nama Produk, Qty Pesan, Satuan, Harga Beli, Disk %, Subtotal, Aksi
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Unwanted columns (Barcode, Merk, Kategori, Jenis, Qty Datang, Isi, Tax %, Batch, Expired, SN) are NOT present
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Product name displayed with amber-200 color for high contrast visibility
VERIFIED: PurchaseEnterprise.jsx - Bottom tabs simplified to 3 tabs: Rincian Item, Riwayat Harga Beli, Riwayat Supplier
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 PO module tests verified: 1) Search in Daftar PO works for PO number, supplier name, and shows empty result for random keywords, 2) Form Buat PO header has correct fields without unwanted fields, 3) Item picker adds products to grid with visible product names, 4) Item grid has simplified columns without unwanted columns, 5) Save PO creates transaction successfully.

test3_item_picker.product_name_visible: ✅ PASS - Product name displayed with amber-200 color

test5_save_po.po_appears_in_list: ✅ PASS - PO0000034 visible with Draft status

rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all PO module features working as expected
